sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20495" key="boubwniako/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βουβων-ιακός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n20495.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for the groin</tr_>, of a bandage, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg003:12:514" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Fasc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.514</biblScope> </bibl> C. (also <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βουβων-ικός</orth>).</sense> </entryFree>
